title: wedelia jacquinii var. parviflora
intro: Wedelia jacquinii var. parviflora, also known as the small-flowered Wedelia or Yellow Beggartick, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is also used for its health benefits, such as treating skin conditions, wounds, and fever, due to its antiseptic and antipyretic properties. Wedelia jacquinii var. parviflora is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to leverage its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
